technology.title: Data leak fears after ransomware attack hits Hong Kong’s Kee Wah Bakery
technology.summary: A major bakery chain has been hit by a ransomware attack on its internal network, prompting Hong Kong’s privacy watchdog to seek details to assess the risk of a potential data leak. Kee Wah Bakery, known for its local and Chinese pastries, revealed the incident on Tuesday, after its internal network malfunctioned on Friday last week. A preliminary investigation found that a ransomware attack had targeted its system, which contains employees’ personal data as well as information related to...

briefing.news_focus: A major bakery chain has been hit by a ransomware attack on its internal network, prompting Hong Kong’s privacy watchdog to seek details to assess the risk of a potential data leak. Kee Wah Bakery, known for its local and Chinese pastries, revealed the incident on Tuesday, after its internal network malfunctioned on Friday last week. A preliminary investigation found that a ransomware attack had targeted its system, which contains employees’ personal data as well as information related to...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 香港知名的奇華餅家遭遇了一次勒索病毒攻擊，導致其內部網絡出現故障。該事件於上週五發生，並在本週二被公開。奇華餅家表示，初步調查顯示攻擊者針對其系統進行了入侵，該系統中儲存了員工的個人資料及其他相關信息。隨著事件的發展，香港的隱私監察機構已要求該公司提供詳細信息，以評估潛在的數據洩露風險。
briefing.background: 奇華餅家是香港著名的糕點連鎖品牌，以其本地及中式糕點聞名。隨著數位化進程的加快，企業內部網絡的安全性日益受到關注。勒索病毒攻擊在全球範圍內愈發頻繁，尤其是針對中小型企業，因為這些企業往往在資安防護上相對薄弱。香港的隱私監察機構在此背景下，對企業的數據保護措施進行了更為嚴格的監管，尤其是在數據洩露事件發生後，對企業的責任與透明度提出了更高要求。
briefing.analysis: 此次勒索病毒攻擊對奇華餅家而言，不僅是技術上的挑戰，還可能影響其品牌形象及顧客信任。香港的隱私監察機構介入調查，顯示出對數據保護的重視，並可能對奇華餅家施加更嚴格的監管措施。若數據洩露情況屬實，將對公司造成法律及財務上的後果。此外，這一事件也可能引發其他企業對於自身網絡安全的重新評估，促使更多企業加強資安防護。隨著事件的進一步發展，市場對於奇華餅家的反應及其後續應對措施將成為關注焦點。

technology.title: SoftBank launches OpenAI cybersecurity in Japan as US restricts rival model

briefing.news_focus: SoftBank launches OpenAI cybersecurity in Japan as US restricts rival model
briefing.news_focus_zh: 日本軟銀集團（SoftBank）推出了基於OpenAI技術的網絡安全解決方案，這一舉措正值美國對競爭對手的模型實施限制之際。此舉顯示出軟銀在全球科技競爭中的積極布局，尤其是在網絡安全領域的發展。
briefing.background: 隨著數位化進程加速，網絡安全成為各國政府和企業的重中之重。日本在這方面的需求日益增加，尤其是在面對日益增長的網絡攻擊威脅時。OpenAI作為人工智能領域的領頭羊，其技術被廣泛應用於各種行業，包括網絡安全。美國近期對某些競爭對手的限制措施，可能促使其他國家和企業加速採用OpenAI的技術，以維持其在全球市場的競爭力。
briefing.analysis: 軟銀推出基於OpenAI的網絡安全解決方案，顯示其在日本市場的策略調整，旨在利用OpenAI的先進技術提升網絡安全防護能力。此舉可能吸引更多企業和政府機構的關注，尤其是在美國限制競爭對手的背景下，軟銀的行動可能被視為一種市場機會。然而，這也可能引發對於數據安全和隱私的擔憂，因為OpenAI的技術在某些情況下可能涉及敏感數據的處理。未來，隨著市場需求的變化，軟銀可能需要調整其產品策略，以應對不斷變化的網絡安全威脅和政策環境。

technology.title: ‘Tax break tart’: hospitality tipped to exploit summer VAT cut on children’s meals
technology.summary: As bosses ridicule the chancellor’s scheme, one venue is offering a £25 ‘kids’ menu of snails and anchovy butter toast Restaurants and pubs are expected to devise “enterprising” schemes to exploit a tax break on meals for under-18s, after one venue launched a menu for “kids” featuring wild burgundy snail salad and anchovy butter toast. Rachel Reeves last month announced a temporary cut in VAT on children’s meals from 20% to 5% between 25 June and 1 September, part of a “Great British summer savings scheme ” to support struggling venues and ease pressure on families. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: As bosses ridicule the chancellor’s scheme, one venue is offering a £25 ‘kids’ menu of snails and anchovy butter toast Restaurants and pubs are expected to devise “enterprising” schemes to exploit a tax break on meals for under-18s, after one venue launched a menu for “kids” featuring wild burgundy snail salad and anchovy butter toast. Rachel Reeves last month announced a temporary cut in VAT on children’s meals from 20% to 5% between 25 June and 1 September, part of a “Great British summer savings scheme ” to support struggling venues and ease pressure on families. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 英國財相宣布自6月25日至9月1日，針對18歲以下兒童的餐飲VAT將從20%降至5%，以支持餐飲業並減輕家庭負擔。隨著這項政策的推出，餐廳和酒吧預計將推出創新菜單以利用這項稅收優惠，其中一間餐廳已推出包含野生勃艮第蝸牛沙拉和鯷魚奶油吐司的25英鎊兒童菜單，受到業界的嘲諷。
briefing.background: 此次VAT減免是英國政府為應對經濟困境而推出的臨時措施，旨在刺激餐飲業的復甦並減輕家庭的經濟壓力。隨著疫情後的經濟恢復，許多餐廳面臨營運困難，因此政府希望透過這種方式吸引更多家庭外出就餐。同時，這也反映出政府在促進消費和支持小型企業方面的政策取向，尤其是在夏季旅遊高峰期。
briefing.analysis: 此次VAT減免政策引發了餐飲業的廣泛關注，許多業者可能會利用這一機會推出創新菜單以吸引家庭顧客。然而，部分業者對此政策持批評態度，認為這樣的措施可能無法根本解決餐飲業的長期困境。從新聞中可見，某些餐廳的創意菜單甚至引發了業界的嘲諷，顯示出對這項政策的不同看法。未來，若此政策能有效提升消費，則可能促進餐飲業的復甦；反之，若無法吸引足夠顧客，則可能導致業者對政府政策的不滿與反彈。

politics.title: Hong Kong’s top court rejects challenge to law banning calls for election boycotts
politics.summary: Hong Kong’s top court has dismissed a legal challenge against a law barring calls to boycott the city’s “patriots-only” elections, ruling that the prohibition is necessary to counter “organised campaigns” seeking to undermine the establishment following the enactment of the national security law. In a judgment delivered on Wednesday, five Court of Final Appeal judges unanimously found that criminalising incitement to undermine elections was essential to further Beijing’s objective of ensuring...

briefing.news_focus: Hong Kong’s top court has dismissed a legal challenge against a law barring calls to boycott the city’s “patriots-only” elections, ruling that the prohibition is necessary to counter “organised campaigns” seeking to undermine the establishment following the enactment of the national security law. In a judgment delivered on Wednesday, five Court of Final Appeal judges unanimously found that criminalising incitement to undermine elections was essential to further Beijing’s objective of ensuring...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 香港最高法院駁回了一項法律挑戰，該挑戰針對禁止呼籲抵制該市“愛國者專屬”選舉的法律。法院裁定，這項禁令是為了對抗有組織的運動，旨在削弱政府，並強調這一措施對於推進北京確保國家安全法後的目標至關重要。五位終審法院法官一致認為，將煽動破壞選舉的行為定為犯罪是必要的。
briefing.background: 香港的選舉制度在過去幾年經歷了重大變化，特別是在國家安全法實施後，政府加強了對政治活動的監管。該法律要求參選者必須是“愛國者”，並禁止任何形式的選舉抵制行為。這一政策的背景是北京希望確保香港的政治環境穩定，防止任何可能挑戰中央政府權威的行為。這一法律的通過引發了廣泛的爭議，許多批評者認為這是對民主自由的侵蝕。
briefing.analysis: 此次裁決反映了香港司法系統在國家安全法框架下的運作，並顯示出法院對於維護政府政策的支持。支持者認為，這是維護社會穩定和國家安全的必要措施，而反對者則擔心這進一步削弱了民主參與和言論自由。未來，隨著選舉的臨近，政府可能會加強對政治活動的監控，這可能導致更多的法律挑戰和社會反彈。此外，這一裁決可能會影響國際社會對香港的觀感，特別是在人權和民主問題上。

politics.title: G7 leaders to boost Ukraine air defences, tighten sanctions on Russia
politics.summary: A statement from the G7 summit in France says leaders are united in their 'unwavering support for Ukraine'.

briefing.news_focus: A statement from the G7 summit in France says leaders are united in their 'unwavering support for Ukraine'.
briefing.news_focus_zh: G7峰會在法國召開，領導人一致表達對烏克蘭的堅定支持，決定加強對烏克蘭的空中防禦能力，同時對俄羅斯施加更嚴格的制裁。這一決定顯示出G7國家在烏克蘭問題上的團結立場。
briefing.background: 自2022年俄烏衝突以來，G7國家一直在支持烏克蘭，提供軍事和經濟援助。隨著衝突的持續，烏克蘭對空中防禦系統的需求日益增加，特別是在俄羅斯對其基礎設施的攻擊加劇的背景下。G7國家的制裁措施旨在削弱俄羅斯的經濟能力，限制其軍事行動的資金來源。
briefing.analysis: G7國家在此次峰會上強調了對烏克蘭的支持，這不僅是出於對烏克蘭主權的尊重，也是為了維護國際秩序與安全。參考報導提到，G7領導人還對美國與伊朗之間的初步和平協議表示歡迎，這表明他們希望在中東地區也能促進穩定。不同報導的重點在於，Al Jazeera專注於烏克蘭的軍事支援，而The Hindu則提到G7對伊朗協議的支持，顯示出G7在多個地緣政治議題上的關注與行動。未來，G7的制裁措施可能會進一步加強，並可能影響俄羅斯的經濟與軍事能力。

supporting_titles: G7 leaders back Ukraine, plan greater pressure on Russia
supporting_summaries: The G7 leaders also welcomed the preliminary peace deal between ‌the ⁠United States and Iran, which Mr. Trump signed on the eve of the summit, and said they ⁠are ready to contribute to its implementation

politics.title: Trump abruptly halts confirmation process for Jay Clayton as US intelligence chief
politics.summary: Move will allow Trump’s controversial pick, Bill Pulte, to assume role and remain in place for at least several weeks Sign up for the Breaking News US newsletter email Donald Trump abruptly halted the confirmation process for Jay Clayton as the US’s top intelligence chief early Wednesday, in a move that will allow Trump’s controversial selection for acting director of national security, Bill Pulte, to assume the role and remain in place for at least several weeks until Clayton is confirmed. Trump pushed the Senate to confirm Clayton after his appointment of Pulte as acting director sparked bipartisan pushback and stalled his administration’s push for renewal of the controversial Foreign Intelligence Surveillance Act (Fisa). Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Move will allow Trump’s controversial pick, Bill Pulte, to assume role and remain in place for at least several weeks Sign up for the Breaking News US newsletter email Donald Trump abruptly halted the confirmation process for Jay Clayton as the US’s top intelligence chief early Wednesday, in a move that will allow Trump’s controversial selection for acting director of national security, Bill Pulte, to assume the role and remain in place for at least several weeks until Clayton is confirmed. Trump pushed the Senate to confirm Clayton after his appointment of Pulte as acting director sparked bipartisan pushback and stalled his administration’s push for renewal of the controversial Foreign Intelligence Surveillance Act (Fisa). Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國總統特朗普於週三突然停止了對杰伊·克萊頓擔任美國情報總監的確認程序，這一舉動使得特朗普的爭議性選擇比爾·普爾特能夠擔任該職位，並至少在幾週內保持在位。特朗普曾推動參議院確認克萊頓，但普爾特的任命引發了兩黨的反對，並阻礙了其政府對於爭議性外國情報監視法（FISA）續期的推進。
briefing.background: 特朗普政府在情報領域的任命一直受到爭議，尤其是在國家安全和情報監控法案的背景下。外國情報監視法案（FISA）是美國政府用於監控外國間諜活動的重要法律，然而其續期問題常常引發政治爭論。克萊頓的提名原本旨在穩定情報機構的領導，但隨著普爾特的任命引發的反彈，特朗普的策略顯示出其在國內政治中面臨的挑戰。
briefing.analysis: 特朗普的決定反映了其在國會中面臨的兩黨壓力，尤其是對普爾特的任命的強烈反對。這一舉動可能會延長普爾特的任期，並使特朗普有更多時間來推動克萊頓的確認。然而，這也可能進一步激化國會對特朗普政府的監督，特別是在情報和國家安全問題上。各方對於普爾特的質疑可能會影響未來的政策推動，尤其是在FISA法案的續期上，這將是特朗普政府的一大挑戰。

economy.title: Surprisingly benign UK inflation data signals a softer Iran war hit than feared
economy.summary: War’s impact on UK cost of living more muted than first forecast suggesting fuel price rises have failed to spill out more widely across UK plc UK inflation stays at 2.8% as slowing food prices offset transport costs Business live – latest updates As soon as Iran choked off oil supplies through the strait of Hormuz at the start of March, there were dire warnings about rocketing UK inflation and the drastic action the Bank of England might take to rein it in. At one point, investors were expecting as many as three quarter-point rises in interest rates before the end of the year – a sharp turnaround from earlier forecasts of rate cuts. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: War’s impact on UK cost of living more muted than first forecast suggesting fuel price rises have failed to spill out more widely across UK plc UK inflation stays at 2.8% as slowing food prices offset transport costs Business live – latest updates As soon as Iran choked off oil supplies through the strait of Hormuz at the start of March, there were dire warnings about rocketing UK inflation and the drastic action the Bank of England might take to rein it in. At one point, investors were expecting as many as three quarter-point rises in interest rates before the end of the year – a sharp turnaround from earlier forecasts of rate cuts. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 英國最新的通脹數據顯示，通脹率維持在2.8%，這一數字低於市場預期，顯示出伊朗戰爭對英國生活成本的影響並不如最初預測的那麼嚴重。儘管在伊朗封鎖霍爾木茲海峽後，市場曾預測通脹將急劇上升，並可能導致英格蘭銀行在年底前進行多次加息，但目前的數據顯示，食品價格的放緩抵消了交通成本的上漲。
briefing.background: 自3月伊朗封鎖霍爾木茲海峽以來，市場對英國通脹的預測變得悲觀，許多分析師擔心能源價格的上漲將導致生活成本大幅上升，並迫使英格蘭銀行採取更嚴厲的貨幣政策。然而，近期的數據顯示，儘管能源價格上漲，食品價格的減少使得整體通脹保持穩定，這與早期的預測形成鮮明對比。
briefing.analysis: 英國的通脹數據顯示出一種意外的韌性，這對於消費者和企業來說都是一個積極的信號。參考報導指出，BBC預測伊朗戰爭將推高英國通脹超過英格蘭銀行的2%目標，而《經濟學人》則強調能源價格的上漲可能會影響生活成本，並可能導致經濟放緩。這些不同的觀點反映了市場對未來經濟走勢的不同預期，尤其是在能源價格的影響上。隨著通脹數據的穩定，市場對於英格蘭銀行的利率政策可能會重新評估，從而影響投資者的信心和消費者的支出行為。

supporting_titles: What is happening to UK prices?
How high could global inflation go?
supporting_summaries: The war in Iran is expected to push UK Inflation further above the Bank of England's 2% target.
With luck, the Iran war won’t cause a recession. But the surge in energy prices will push up the cost of living

economy.title: Iran pledges no bomb; U.S. promises sanctions relief, $300 billion financing; agreement’s leaked text shows
economy.summary: The draft, published by Saudi Arabia’s Al Arabiya network, states that Iran has pledged never to produce nuclear weapons, while U.S. would lift sanctions on the sale of Iranian crude oil, petrochemical products and other services, including banking, during the negotiation period, and commits itself to lifting all sanctions as part of a final agreement

briefing.news_focus: The draft, published by Saudi Arabia’s Al Arabiya network, states that Iran has pledged never to produce nuclear weapons, while U.S. would lift sanctions on the sale of Iranian crude oil, petrochemical products and other services, including banking, during the negotiation period, and commits itself to lifting all sanctions as part of a final agreement
briefing.news_focus_zh: 伊朗承諾不會生產核武器，而美國則承諾在談判期間解除對伊朗原油、石化產品及其他服務的制裁，包括銀行業務。根據沙烏地阿拉伯的阿拉比亞網路發布的草案，這一協議的最終版本將包括美國全面解除所有制裁的承諾。
briefing.background: 伊朗的核計畫一直是國際社會關注的焦點，尤其是在美國於2018年單方面退出伊朗核協議後，雙方關係惡化。隨著地緣政治緊張局勢的加劇，伊朗的核能力被視為潛在威脅。美國對伊朗的制裁旨在限制其核發展及其他軍事活動，然而這些制裁也對伊朗經濟造成了重大影響。近期，隨著國際社會對伊朗核問題的重新評估，雙方似乎在尋求透過談判來解決分歧，並促進地區穩定。
briefing.analysis: 此次協議的達成顯示出美國與伊朗在核問題上的某種妥協意願。伊朗承諾不生產核武器，可能是為了獲得經濟上的支持，特別是在制裁解除的背景下，這將有助於其經濟復甦。美國則希望通過解除制裁來促進與伊朗的對話，並減少地區緊張局勢。然而，這一協議仍面臨挑戰，特別是在美國國內政治及其盟友的反對聲音中，部分國家可能會對美國的讓步表示擔憂。此外，協議的具體執行及監督機制仍需進一步明確，以確保各方遵守承諾。

economy.title: Electrical retailer AO shifts UK call centre roles to South Africa
economy.summary: About 150 jobs have already been lost in Bolton as company reports 145% rise in profits and hands £20m to shareholders Business live – latest updates The online electrical goods seller AO World has revealed it is outsourcing up to 200 UK call centre roles to South Africa blaming rising labour costs, as it handed £20m to shareholders. As the retailer reported a jump in profits, it said it was shifting the majority of call centre jobs overseas “in response to ongoing inflationary cost pressures, and particularly rising employment costs”. It expects to save about £4m a year as a result of the change. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: About 150 jobs have already been lost in Bolton as company reports 145% rise in profits and hands £20m to shareholders Business live – latest updates The online electrical goods seller AO World has revealed it is outsourcing up to 200 UK call centre roles to South Africa blaming rising labour costs, as it handed £20m to shareholders. As the retailer reported a jump in profits, it said it was shifting the majority of call centre jobs overseas “in response to ongoing inflationary cost pressures, and particularly rising employment costs”. It expects to save about £4m a year as a result of the change. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 英國電器零售商AO World宣布將約200個呼叫中心職位外包至南非，並已在博爾頓失去約150個工作崗位。該公司表示，這一決定是因為持續的通脹壓力和上升的勞動成本。儘管如此，AO World報告其利潤上升145%，並向股東分配2000萬英鎊，預計此舉每年可節省約400萬英鎊。
briefing.background: AO World是一家專注於線上電器銷售的公司，最近因為全球通脹和勞動成本上升而面臨經營壓力。隨著消費者對價格敏感度的提高，許多企業選擇透過外包來降低成本。英國的勞動市場在疫情後復甦，但工資上漲和生活成本增加使得企業經營壓力加大。AO World的這一決策反映了當前零售業面臨的挑戰，尤其是在保持盈利能力與控制成本之間的平衡。
briefing.analysis: AO World的外包決策顯示出企業在面對成本壓力時的應對策略，特別是在利潤上升的情況下選擇減少本地就業。這一舉措可能引發社會對於企業責任的討論，尤其是在當地失業率上升的背景下。儘管公司能夠節省開支，但失去的工作崗位將對當地社區造成影響。股東獲得分紅的同時，員工卻面臨失業，這可能引發對企業道德的質疑。未來，若其他企業跟隨AO World的腳步，可能會加劇英國的就業市場壓力，並引發更廣泛的社會反響。
